generic_rules: Focus repairs on the scope indicated by the validator error.
Implementation-level contracts (assignments) belong in implementation annexes.
Type-level contracts (assumptions, guarantees) belong in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings to existing outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation annexes.
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
